CREATE TABLE test_directory (id INT PRIMARY KEY, dir_path VARCHAR(255));
SELECT file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM test_directory WHERE id = 1;
SELECT file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM test_directory WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_directory WHERE dir_path LIKE '/tmp/%');
SELECT id, file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM test_directory WHERE id <= (SELECT MAX(id) FROM test_directory);
SELECT file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM (SELECT dir_path FROM test_directory WHERE id = 2) AS sub_query;
SELECT dir_path, file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM test_directory WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name = 'test_directory');
SELECT file_dirlist(dir_path) FROM (SELECT dir_path FROM test_directory ORDER BY dir_path DESC LIMIT 1) AS last_dir;
